testcase.name: shouldReturnBadRequestWhenSkuCodeMissing
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-22T15:41:19.455+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.nhom1.inventory_service.InventoryServiceApplicationTests$IntegrationApi]: IntegrationApi does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-22T15:41:19.528+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [ ] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.nhom1.inventory_service.InventoryServiceApplication for test class com.nhom1.inventory_service.InventoryServiceApplicationTests$IntegrationApi 2026-03-22T15:41:19.608+07:00 WARN 1812 --- [ main] [69bfab2f004b87bdacc168e0879d6e5e-acc168e0879d6e5e] .w.s.m.s.DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MissingServletRequestParameterException: Required request parameter 'skuCode' for method parameter type List is not present]

skipped.message: Business decision: blank skuCode is currently accepted

testcase.name: shouldKeepPublicBehaviorWhenAuthDisabled
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-22T15:41:20.345+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [69bfab30b92f2d5eefe35cffbf72ca51-efe35cffbf72ca51] c.n.i.controller.InventoryController : Inventory check completed for 1 SKU(s)

testcase.system-out: 2026-03-22T15:41:20.698+07:00 INFO 1812 --- [ main] [69bfab301956b85f95188e6a223512ff-95188e6a223512ff] c.n.i.controller.InventoryController : Inventory check completed for 1 SKU(s)

skipped.message: Requires fault injection setup to force database outage at runtime
